releaseNotes: Adds a conversion-craft lane adapted from Corey Haines' marketingskills (MIT, © Corey Haines 2025) where this skill was genuinely thin, without duplicating lanes it already covers deeply.

Adds references/conversion-copy.md so voice-of-customer mining, message hierarchy, claims discipline, and per-surface copy recipes produce COPY_BRIEF.md for landing pages, store listings, paywalls, email, and screenshots.

Adds references/cro-landing.md so public-funnel CRO audits produce CRO_AUDIT.md and cover above-the-fold promise, proof, CTA clarity, mobile friction, and Core Web Vitals outside the in-app onboarding lane.

Folds experiment-design discipline into analytics-attribution.md so copy and landing-page tests require falsifiable hypotheses, minimum detectable effects, sample sizing, anti-peeking rules, and low-traffic honesty before a win is claimed.

Wires the new conversion-copy and landing-CRO surfaces into SKILL.md routing, launch-coverage.md, artifact contracts, and source-registry.yaml with explicit MIT attribution while keeping already-covered marketing lanes and out-of-scope B2B playbooks excluded.
